providers.verification: Restart or reload the Agent, then verify the declared MCP or Skill is discoverable.
providers.notes: Do not create a new canonical skill directory inside this template; use the provider's supported location. Add Google Workspace remote MCP only when this Codex client version supports HTTP OAuth MCP and the configuration has been verified.

providers.verification: Reload Claude Code and run the Skill's minimum verification case.
providers.notes: Google Workspace remote MCP setup in the official guide targets Claude.ai or Claude Desktop connectors; do not assume it is automatically available in Claude Code.

providers.verification: Restart OpenCode and run the MCP initialize or minimum Skill case.
Use the MCP Server Hub or provider settings, then run a non-destructive tool call.
providers.notes: The first release supplies guided manual configuration rather than claiming unattended installation. Google Workspace remote MCP uses the provider's OAuth connector flow.
